artPrompt: A long folding table laden with casseroles, chip bowls, and a single lonely hard-boiled egg glows under golden afternoon light as a crowd of townsfolk surge around it on the town green, the steam and dust catching dramatic backlight; widescreen film-still framing pulls the eye down the table into hazy deep-focus picket fences and bullhorns, wholesome fervor crackling in the air, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Potluck Rally
text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn for each different snack physically present at the table, to a maximum of +3/+3. (If there are no snacks, that's the saddest rally, and they get +0/+0.)
flavorText: Marge brought the casserole. Dale brought chips. Someone brought a single hard-boiled egg and refuses to explain.

extras.fourthWall: counts real snacks at the table
